ddls:
CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "clothing_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item being measured */,
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement type (e.g., bust, waist, inseam) */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart being used */,
  "value" REAL /* Measured value */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was taken */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_clothing_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("clothing_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_measurement_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_type_id") REFERENCES measurement_types ("measurement_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "clothing_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category (e.g., tops, bottoms) */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subcategory (e.g., shirts, pants) */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the style (e.g., casual, formal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clothing_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES subcategories ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_types" (
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "measurement_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement type */,
  "measurement_description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement type */,
  "measurement_type_group" TEXT /* Group of the measurement type (e.g., body measurements, garment measurements) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size chart (e.g., XXXXXS, XXXXS) */,
  "size_range" TEXT /* Range of the size chart (e.g., XS-XXL) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "subcategory_description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the style */,
  "style_description" TEXT /* Description of the style */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designers" (
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each designer */,
  "designer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the designer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the designer */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role (e.g., senior designer, junior designer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the designer (e.g., design, production) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_designers_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patterns" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pattern */,
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the designer who created the pattern */,
  "clothing_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item being patterned */,
  "pattern_name" TEXT /* Name of the pattern */,
  "pattern_status" TEXT /* Status of the pattern (e.g., draft, approved) */,
  "pattern_revision" INTEGER /* Revision number of the pattern */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pattern */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patterns_designer_id FOREIGN KEY ("designer_id") REFERENCES designers ("designer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patterns_clothing_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("clothing_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_control" (
  "qc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control check */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being checked */,
  "qc_date" TEXT /* Date the quality control check was performed */,
  "qc_status" TEXT /* Status of the quality control check (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "qc_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the quality control check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart entry */,
  "clothing_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item being charted */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart being used */,
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement type being charted */,
  "value" REAL /* Charted value */,
  "size_chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the size chart */,
  "size_chart_description" TEXT /* Description of the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_clothing_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("clothing_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_measurement_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_type_id") REFERENCES measurement_types ("measurement_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the designer accessing the measurement data */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the designer accessing the measurement data */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser information of the designer accessing the measurement data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_designer_id FOREIGN KEY ("designer_id") REFERENCES designers ("designer_id")
)
